1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Band Row Rotate Press
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Hang Power Clean
3 Tall Clean
10 Strict Press
0530 Specific Warm Up
PVC Shoulder Opener
2 mins on Rower
10 Cossack Squats
Barbell Clean Flow

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
E4MOM x 4
2 Rope Climbs
20 Cal Row
10 Deadlifts @ 90/55kg
Rest in time remaining.
Score fastest round

hypertrophy.reasoning: Balance pressing fatigue with pulling volume; strengthen posterior chain and stabilizers without competing with deadlift/row recovery.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Strength: Bench Press, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Metcon: EMOM: 2 Rope Climbs, 20 Cal Row, 10 Deadlifts @ 90/55kg. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
